---
id: get-tenant-access
title: "Get tenant access"
description: "Returns everything the app needs in a single call: the tenant's units, their access status, and their entry points. Call this on app launch and on pull-to-refresh, then cache the response for offline use."
sidebar_label: "Get tenant access"
hide_title: true
hide_table_of_contents: true
api: 
sidebar_class_name: "get api-method"
info_path: docs/api-reference/kiss-api
custom_edit_url: null
---

import MethodEndpoint from "@theme/ApiExplorer/MethodEndpoint";
import ParamsDetails from "@theme/ParamsDetails";
import RequestSchema from "@theme/RequestSchema";
import StatusCodes from "@theme/StatusCodes";
import OperationTabs from "@theme/OperationTabs";
import TabItem from "@theme/TabItem";
import Heading from "@theme/Heading";
import Translate from "@docusaurus/Translate";

<Heading
  as={"h1"}
  className={"openapi__heading"}
  children={"Get tenant access"}
>
</Heading>

<MethodEndpoint
  method={"get"}
  path={"/tenant/access"}
  context={"endpoint"}
>
  
</MethodEndpoint>



Returns everything the app needs in a single call: the tenant's units, their access status, and their entry points. Call this on app launch and on pull-to-refresh, then cache the response for offline use.


<ParamsDetails
  parameters={undefined}
>
  
</ParamsDetails>

  {...require("./get-tenant-access.RequestSchema.json")}
>
  
</RequestSchema>

>
